name: claude-cinematic
title: Claude Cinematic Conversation
description: Consolidated from the six launch/cinematic prototypes (pass 115); canonical tokens + shared response-mark atom, pending official product capture. The one zoomed cinematic Claude conversation for close-up video beats: ?beat=prompt (user asks + thinking loader), ?beat=reply (large serif answer + composer), ?beat=complete (done copy). Copy overridable via data-copy slots; add class theme-dark for dark. Dark theme: add class "theme-dark" to the composition root.
